name: multi-llm-marketplace
description: Skyline plugins for Claude Code, including MCP daemon wiring and agent-side enforcement hooks.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Opinionated Claude Code baseline: /core:setup installs the judge-hook rules engine, the writing-guard, the core-hud statusline, and CLAUDE.md guidelines, with a full-bypass permission posture gated by the judge-hook.

plugins.name: agent-org
plugins.description: Skylence agent-org v2 in a box (operator redesign 2026-06-10). Bundles the Solo MCP server (board/PTY/timer substrate every role needs) plus 4 role skills: orchestrator, solo-worker, replacer, org-audit. 2 session-discipline hooks: org-lane-mark (PreToolUse marker on Solo spawn/timer tools) + org-stop-gate (Stop gate blocking final Stop until workers report done). Includes build-slot compile serializer, ghost-probe PTY check (no-fusion law), and the Codex-side conduct pack.
